question: What role did I apply for at Qualcomm?
notes: 4 Qualcomm acks via Workday. Subject doesn't reveal the role; the role lives in the body — tests whether the retriever finds them at all.

question: Did Imperial College acknowledge my application?
notes: 4 Imperial Research Associate role acks. msg_000970 is a duplicate ack for AI for Chemistry.

question: What did the Ellison Institute say in their email?
notes: Single email (msg_000081) chunked into 9 parts. LinkedIn-relayed ack 'your application was sent to Ellison Institute of Technology Oxford'.

question: Which universities did I apply to?
notes: The canonical Week 1 failure. 8 unique universities across 13 acks. Mix of direct ATS, Workday, LinkedIn relays.

question: Which companies invited me to an interview?
notes: 6 companies: Hubert, Baringa, InterDigital, Generative Engineering, Allps, Flatgigs. One canonical chunk per company; follow-up reminders excluded to keep ground truth tight.

question: Which companies sent me rejection emails?
notes: 34 high-confidence rejections (subjects clearly indicate outcome/status/update). Body-keyword filter ('unfortunately', 'not been selected', 'pursue other candidates', etc.). Borderline ack/rejection cases (Greyparrot, ASOS, Lands End, Giotto.ai) excluded to keep ground truth tight.

question: Which postdoc positions did I apply for?
notes: 11 chunks. UK 'Research Associate' roles are postdoc-equivalent; included alongside the explicit Konstanz Postdoc. Cross-cuts with Q5 (universities).

question: Which research engineer roles did I apply to?
notes: 5 companies: EPFL, idealworks (Ops RE), Relation, InterDigital (Virginie's reply confirms the RE application), hyperexponential. Excludes user's self-sent follow-ups.

question: Did I get an acknowledgment from GSK?
notes: 5 Workday GSK acks across 3 roles (AIML Engineer x2, AIML Software Engineer, Applied AI Engineer x2). BM25-favouring: 'GSK' is an acronym embeddings rarely encode well.

question: Show me the Amazon application email
notes: 8 'Thank you for Applying to Amazon!' English-subject acks. Excludes German/Japanese variants, AWS-billing, AWS-marketing, and LinkedIn job suggestions.

question: Did I apply to ALESAYI HOLDING?
notes: Single LinkedIn-relayed ack. Subject is bilingual (English + Arabic). Tests retrieval over rare tokens.

question: Where did I apply for academic jobs?
notes: Same ground truth as Q5, different vocabulary. 'Academic jobs' has zero string overlap with the email content ('Research Associate', 'Postdoc', university domains). Tests dense vs lexical retrieval head-to-head.

question: Did I apply for any roles working on large language models?
notes: Single match: Cinemo Senior AI/ML Engineer (NLP/LLM/GenAI). The phrasing 'large language models' is descriptive; the subject uses the acronym 'LLM'. Tests whether the embedder bridges the two.
